comments.LineComment: | Comprehensive usage examples for Hydrogen Product Tours
| This module provides complete, production-ready examples demonstrating
| - **Branching Tour**: User choices affect the tour path
| - **Interactive Tutorial**: Tours that wait for user actions
| -- Or use examples as templates for your own tours
| All tours follow the Elm architecture:
| State changes are pure. Side effects (DOM, storage, analytics) are
| represented as commands that the runtime executes.
| 1. Add `tourState :: Tour.TourState YourMsg` to your app state
| 4. Handle messages in your update function
| See individual examples below for complete patterns.
| The tour components respect these CSS custom properties for theming:
| The tour runtime sets these data attributes for styling and testing:
| | `data-target` | Spotlight | CSS selector | Target element selector |
| The tour traps focus within the tooltip for accessibility.

value.value: This tutorial will guide you through real actions. You'll actually use the app as we go!
Type a name for your project in this field. We'll wait for you.
You've named your project. Now let's create it.
Click the Create button to make your project. Go ahead, we'll wait!
You've created your first project. You're ready to start using the app for real.
Press Cmd+K to quickly search for anything in the app.
Click here to see your notifications and activity feed.
Access your settings, preferences, and account options here.
Click here for documentation, tutorials, and support options.
How familiar are you with our platform?
This is your home base. Everything starts here. Let's walk through the basics.
Click this button whenever you want to create something new.
Access advanced features, keyboard shortcuts, and automation tools here.
Press '?' at any time to see all available shortcuts.
You've completed the tour. Explore on your own, and remember: help is always available in the '?' menu.
Let's take a quick tour to help you get started. This will only take a minute.
Use the sidebar to navigate between different sections of the app.
Customize your experience in the settings panel.
This guided tour will help you learn the interface. Use Tab to navigate buttons, Enter to activate, and Escape to close at any time.
This navigation region contains links to all main sections. Use arrow keys to move between items when focused.
Type your search terms here. Results update as you type. Press Enter to see all results, or use arrow keys to select from suggestions.
Press Enter or Space on this button to create a new item. A dialog will open where you can enter details.
You've completed the tour! Focus will return to the main content. Press the question mark key at any time to see keyboard shortcuts.
